questions.q: How do I reset my password?
questions.a: Click "Forgot password" on the login page and enter your registered email address. You'll receive a reset link within a few minutes. If you don't see it, check your spam folder.
No. Each user is permitted one account on MariNation. Operating multiple accounts is a violation of our Terms of Use and may result in permanent suspension of all associated accounts.

questions.q: How does MariNation protect against fraud?
questions.a: We use automated fraud detection, identity verification on withdrawal requests, and manual review for suspicious activity. If you notice unauthorized access to your account, contact support immediately at support@marinationmusic.com.
Yes. You can request account closure from your settings page or by contacting support. Any remaining balance will be refunded to your linked payment method before closure.

questions.q: Does MariNation support responsible gambling features?
questions.a: Yes. You can set daily, weekly, or monthly deposit limits from your account settings at any time. We also support self-exclusion options for users who need a break. Your wellbeing matters to us.
